items.headline: 8 families gone in 48hrs. MRR down $5.4K to $41.6K.
items.detail: 60 active families, down from 68. 9 paused. Stripe shows 67.6% monthly churn but that likely includes test subs & payment failures. Still - 8 real families leaving in 2 days is a signal worth investigating. Parent Call Dashboard is live to help catch the next wave early.

items.headline: No-show engine recovering dead leads - 78 contacts, $27K upside, zero ad spend.
items.detail: 79 no-shows found in HubSpot. Zero previously recovered. 56 were Elliot's old leads. Touch 1 sent to 78 contacts. Touch 2 fires today. At 20% rebook & 63% close = ~10 new families. This is free pipeline.

items.headline: Lead-to-booked hit 69% MTD. Smart Lead Router is working.
items.detail: 13 leads, 9 booked (69.2%) since router went live. Last week was 11% (11 of 100). Anthony & Elliot now get priority leads instead of everything dumping on Tom. Early but the signal is strong.

items.headline: Tom's trending up - 50% close rate, callback booked for 1pm today.
items.detail: Tom scored 6.63 avg across 6 calls this week. 2 closes (James McLennan, Lorissa Garcia). Christy Richards said 'call me at 1pm tomorrow' - that's today. Emily Brady follow-up Tuesday is also live. His weak spot: both-parents close & analytical parent deepening.

items.headline: Team-wide Emotion score is the gap. All 3 reps weakest on E.
items.detail: Anthony E=2.2, Rye E=1.67, Tom E=3.17. Weekly coaching pack shipped to Rye - drills: Co-Score, Hold Space, Fear Anchor. Rye's own calls declining (5.17 avg, 0% close). This week's coaching session needs to land.

leo_actions: No-show recovery Touch 2 firing today for 78 contacts - zero cost pipeline
Smart Lead Router distributing at 7:30am - Anthony/Elliot priority, Tom overflow
Weekly DC Coaching Pack delivered to Rye - team Emotion drill focus
Parent Call Dashboard live at 8am - 16 families flagged for calls today
